page_content:
WGSS469 Study Abroad Special Topics IV (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program. Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs. Formerly: WMST469.

WGSS452 Women in the Media (3 Credits) Participation and portrayal of women in the mass media from colonial to contemporary times. Cross-listed with: JOUR452. Credit Only Granted for: JOUR452, WMST452 or WGSS452. Formerly: WMST 452.

WGSS454 Women in Africa (3 Credits) The place of women in African societies: the role and function of families; institutions such as marriage, birthing, and child rearing; ritual markers in women's lives; women in the workplace; women's associates; women's health issues; measures designed to control women's behavior; women and development. Credit Only Granted for: HIST494, WMST454 or WGSS454. Formerly: WMST454.
